text:
miwi        2009-05-17 12:33:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-waf         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/py-waf/files   patch-wscript 
  Log:
  Waf is a Python-based framework for configuring, compiling and
  installing applications. It is a replacement for other tools such
  as autotools, scons, cmake or Ant.
  
  PR:             ports/133260
  Submitted by:   Olivier Duchateau <duchateau.olivier at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path

  1.1       +186 -0    ports/devel/py-waf/pkg-plist (new)
